title: Rojavai Thaalattum Thendral Lyrics Ninaivellam Nithiya
stanzas:
Rojavai thaalattum thendral
pon megam nam pandhal
un koondhal en oonjal
un varthai sangeethangal

Rojavai thaalattum thendral
pon megam nam pandhal

ilaigalil kadhal kaditham
vandu ezhuthum poonjolai.
viralgalil meni muzhuthum
ilamai varaiyum or kavithai.(2)

mouname sammadham endru
venduthe manmatha vandu(2)

vasanthangal vazhthum pozhuthu
unadhu kilaiyil poo aaven.
ilaiudhir kaala muludhum
magzhinthu unaku ver aaven(2)

poovile methaigal thaipen
kannukkul mangaiyai vaippen(2)

Rojavai thaalattum thendral
pon megam nam pandhal
un koondhal en oonjal
un varthai sangeethangal

Rojavai thaalattum thendral
pon megam nam pandhal

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song Rojavai Thaalattum Thendral expresses deep romantic feelings and the beauty of love.

In which movie is this song featured?

This song is featured in the movie Ninaivellam Nithiya.

Who are the singers of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary singers S. Janaki and S. P. Balasubramaniam.

When was this song released?

This song was released in 1982.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Rojavai Thaalattum Thendral, the lyrics beautifully depict the emotions of love and longing, making it a perfect romantic melody. Featured in the movie Ninaivellam Nithiya, the song resonates with anyone who has experienced the sweetness of love. The harmonious blend of S. Janaki and S. P. Balasubramaniam's voices adds depth to the heartfelt lyrics. This classic song evokes nostalgia and warmth, making it a timeless favorite for romantic occasions.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Rojavai Thaalattum Thendral from the timeless classic Ninaivellam Nithiya captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voices of S. Janaki and S. P. Balasubramaniam, this melody transports listeners to a world of heartfelt emotions. Experience the magic of this song that beautifully intertwines love and longing.
stanzaMeanings: The gentle breeze that sings of roses, your hair sways like a swing, your words are melodies.
The gentle breeze that sings of roses, our gathering.
In the leaves, love messages are written like a flower. Every finger holds a poem until youth lasts.
Silence is needed, as love comes.
When I see you, I feel like a flower that blooms.
In the season of spring, a flower will come to your branch. All the leaves will fall, and something else will come to you.
In the flower, I will place the sweetness of a mango in your eyes.
You are the thread that ties everything together.
The gentle breeze that sings of roses, your hair sways like a swing, your words are melodies.
The gentle breeze that sings of roses, our gathering.
